description: Recursive decomposition example: Hospital system showing context passing for sub-agent

input.requirements: Build a hospital simulation with Emergency, Surgery, and Recovery departments...

stages.action: Sub-agent decomposes EmergencyDept with full context

context_passed.original_project_requirements: Build a hospital simulation with Emergency, Surgery, and Recovery departments...

specification.function: Overall hospital management. Routes patients through departments.

sub_agent_output.coupling_specification: EIC: Hospital.patient_in -> Triage.patient_in. IC: Triage.priority_out -> Treatment.priority_in. EOC: Treatment.treated_out -> Hospital.internal_transfer

key_insight: In recursive mode, each sub-agent receives the FULL context: original requirements, all ancestors' specs, all siblings' specs, and its own logic_path. This ensures the sub-agent knows its position in the hierarchy and can make consistent decisions about ports, data types, and coupling.
